author: botmonster
description: Convert raster images (PNG, JPG, WEBP, TIFF) to scalable SVG vector graphics. Accepts base64 data or a URL, runs locally with no API key, and exposes the full VTracer parameter set (color mode, tracing mode, speckle filtering, corner threshold).
name: Image to SVG

tools.name: convert_image_to_svg
tools.description: Convert a raster image (PNG, JPG, WEBP, TIFF) to an SVG vector graphic. Provide the image as base64 data or a URL.

image_base64.description: Base64-encoded image data. Provide this OR image_url. Handles data:image/...;base64, prefixes.

image_url.description: URL to fetch the image from (http://, https://, or file:// when enabled). Provide this OR image_base64.

colormode.description: Full color or black/white line art.

mode.description: Tracing mode: smooth curves, straight edges, or pixel-perfect.

filter_speckle.description: Remove speckles of N pixels or fewer.

color_precision.description: Color quantization bits. Lower means fewer colors and a simpler SVG.

layer_difference.description: Color difference for merging gradient layers.

corner_threshold.description: Angle threshold for corner detection, in degrees.

splice_threshold.description: Angle threshold for splicing splines, in degrees.
